---
title: 'Just Because'
date: '2014-08-17T04:46:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4221549319508033027'
blogger_filename: '/2014/08/just-because.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>I'm journaling right now, because I haven't been. I'm doing it from the android.</p>
<p>Tomorrow is the Rangers/Angels game. It's going to be 100*F tomorrow, game starts at 2PM, rain is projected to start at 3pm. Maybe I should let Flavia take the kids. But Connor really wants to go just like I went with my Dad.</p>
<p>...</p>
